dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped 'base resistance level' to Bollinger Band upper (bb_upper) as a proxy for consolidation breakout. RSI >= 85 indicates strong momentum post-breakout. Volume confirmation uses vol_ratio_20 >= 1.2 (20% above 20-day average). Close remaining above resistance is confirmed by requiring close > bb_upper at bar end. Exit on close below resistance or -5% loss. The signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT but entry is fundamentally LONG (breakout entry). Breakout confirmation requirement absorbed into entry conditions. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP based on post-breakout behavior.

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped 'base resistance level' to Bollinger Band upper (bb_upper) as a proxy for consolidation breakout. RSI >= 85 indicates strong momentum post-breakout. Volume confirmation uses vol_ratio_20 >= 1.2 (20% above 20-day average). Close remaining above resistance is confirmed by requiring close > bb_upper at bar end. Exit on close below resistance or -5% loss. The signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT but entry is fundamentally LONG (breakout entry). Breakout confirmation requirement absorbed into entry conditions. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP based on post-breakout behavior.

source_rule_text: Enter a position at the breakout point from a consolidation pattern rather than anticipating the breakout, to minimize the probability of loss and avoid being shaken out by normal intra-pattern fluctuation.
